name: Salmon Pate #1
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh salmon, omit the liquid smoke.
2. Blend all ingredients in a mixing bowl until smooth and well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl.
4. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
5. Garnish with parsley sprigs.
6. Serve with party rye or crackers. Makes 2 cups.
